ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. Demographic survey fields are included as they were present in the HTML.

fields.question: Are you legally authorized to work in the United States?
options: Yes, I am legally authorized to work in the United States and do not require future sponsorship
Yes, I am currently legally authorized to work in the United States, but I will require sponsorship in the future (e.g., after OPT).

fields.question: For Canadian based candidates- are you legally authorized to work in Canada?
options: Yes, I am legally authorized to work in Canada and do not require future sponsorship
Yes, I am currently legally authorized to work in Canada, but I will require sponsorship in the future

fields.question: Our approved hiring hubs are the SF Bay Area, Austin, Denver, the NYC Metro Area, Calgary, and Toronto. Are you located within 60 miles of any of these areas?
options: Yes, Austin, TX (or anywhere in Texas)
No, I am not located within 60 miles of these hubs

fields.question: While this is a remote role, our "Fully Flexible" model means we require our team members to live near one of these hubs so we can get together for occasional in-person collaboration. Are you open to this setup?
options: Yes, I am open to occasional in-person collaboration.
No, I am looking for a 100% remote role with no in-person requirements.
I am not in a hub but I am open to relocation and occasional in-person collaboration.

fields.question: Have you reviewed the role requirements and compensation range for this position? Please carefully review these details before submitting your application.
